name: file-converter
description: Monorepo with Angular 21 frontend and Golang WebAssembly (WASM) backend

scripts.build:wasm: tinygo build -o frontend/src/assets/wasm/converter.wasm -target=wasm ./go-wasm/cmd/wasm && cp $(tinygo env TINYGOROOT)/targets/wasm_exec.js frontend/src/assets/wasm/
scripts.build: npm run build:wasm && npm --prefix frontend run build
scripts.start: npm run build:wasm && npm --prefix frontend start
